info.title: WaitSpin REST API
info.summary: Contract for the shipped WaitSpin control API and Stripe webhook.
info.description: WaitSpin is an agent-first ad marketplace for developer wait-states. This contract covers the shipped public REST API routes, discovery endpoint, and Stripe webhook endpoint.

tags.name: Blocks
tags.description: Stripe Checkout and crypto MPP rails for prepaid impression blocks.

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: User wallet, ledger, Connect, and payout operations.

post.summary: Verify an email code and receive a WaitSpin API key.

get.summary: Read native account activation and destination state.

post.summary: Issue a short-lived native advertiser capability.

delete.summary: Revoke the current credential and its dependent credentials.

post.summary: Accept a bounded privacy-safe analytics batch.

get.summary: Read the authenticated account analytics decision without consuming monthly quota.

200.description: Current consent state, including the initial unknown revision.

put.summary: Compare-and-set the authenticated account analytics decision.

get.summary: Read the canonical publisher earning, payout, and maturity policy.

200.description: Server-owned earning policy and user-facing copy.

get.summary: List current device installation generations for rotation recovery.

200.description: Current account- and device-bound installation state.

post.summary: Create one pending target-bound child credential generation.

201.description: Direct child credential or editor bootstrap token issued once.

post.summary: Redeem or idempotently resume an editor bootstrap token.
post.description: Protocol 2 binds a client-generated key and permits same-key replay to recover a lost response without returning the key. Requests without redeem_protocol remain temporary protocol 1 compatibility for released 0.1.14 clients and return a server-generated key once.

200.description: Protocol 2 returns stable credential metadata for first redeem and same-key replay without api_key; temporary protocol 1 returns the generated key once.

delete.summary: Deactivate one account- and device-bound installation.

200.description: Installation removed and child credentials revoked.

post.summary: Confirm the current child generation is registered and ready.
Request double opt-in subscription to WaitSpin launch emails.
post.description: Creates or refreshes a non-account marketing-list subscriber and sends a confirmation email. This route does not issue API keys; /list/confirm and /list/unsubscribe are browser/email-link routes and are intentionally not API-key routes.

200.description: Confirmation email accepted or subscriber already confirmed.

get.summary: Read the active public campaign leaderboard.
Read the public server-owned purchase-option contract.

200.description: Versioned purchase options and custom bounds.

get.summary: List campaigns for the authenticated account.

post.summary: Create a draft campaign and pending prepaid block purchase.
Create a distinct campaign from an eligible account-owned source.

201.description: Repeat campaign and pending purchase created.

post.summary: Create or reuse a Stripe Checkout URL for a pending campaign.
Create or reuse a Stripe/Tempo stablecoin MPP challenge for a pending block purchase.
post.description: Production Stripe/Tempo stablecoin MPP pay-in rail for existing WaitSpin block purchases. Blocks are activated only after the MPP credential verifies and Stripe reports the bound PaymentIntent as succeeded.

200.description: MPP payment settled in Stripe and WaitSpin blocks were activated.

202.description: MPP credential verified but the Stripe PaymentIntent has not reached succeeded.

post.summary: Register a supported user install target.
Return the next sponsored message for a user install.
Record a billable impression after the visible interval.
Record an idempotent creative view for click analytics.

get.summary: Record the first valid click and redirect to its stored destination.

302.description: Redirect to the destination captured at serve time.

429.description: Redirect lookup throttled before database access.

get.summary: Read user balance, trust state, Connect status, and payout eligibility.

post.summary: Create or refresh a Stripe Express onboarding link.

get.summary: Read user delivery, reversal, hold, and payout ledger rows.

post.summary: Preview or execute a guarded idempotent user payout.

201.description: Payout executed when guarded flags and policy allow it.

post.summary: Receive Stripe Checkout, refund, dispute, and Connect events.
post.description: This endpoint authenticates the raw body with Stripe-Signature and is not called with a WaitSpin API key.

Forbidden.description: API key lacks the required scope, profile, or trust state.

NotFound.description: Route or resource was not found.

PaymentRequired.description: MPP payment challenge. The WWW-Authenticate header contains the Payment challenge.

company.description: Honeypot field; must be omitted or empty.

capabilities.description: Optional measurement capabilities; omission preserves the legacy CPM response.

country.description: Two-letter user payout country for new Stripe Express accounts.
